approved_route_semantics.capacity_route: Anchor current/local PV installed capacity to CBS Alkmaar photovoltaic capacity, then scale to the frozen 2035 planning layer with a signed II3050/scenario growth factor.
approved_route_semantics.pv_param_boundary: PV-PARAM-001 decides only the irradiance-to-kW conversion once signed installed_capacity_kw is supplied; it does not decide the CBS source year, II3050 growth factor, capacity convention, or node allocation.

allocation_candidates: uniform or load-proportional allocation across eligible load nodes, unsigned and not recommended without spatial evidence
CBS/DEGO/Zonnedakje or building-roof evidence for spatial allocation if concrete data and license are registered
3DBAG roof-plane distribution to derive tilt/aspect/orientation classes for later pvlib/PVGIS-style conversion, not for capacity totals by itself
capacity_convention_candidates: panelvermogen/DC kWp converted to kW-like installed_capacity_kw for PV-PARAM only if PI signs DC convention
omvormervermogen/AC kW as grid-facing installed_capacity_kw only if PI signs AC convention
dual-record DC and AC capacities with a signed DC/AC mapping before conversion

fail_closed_non_claims: No raw D-014 data has been downloaded by this packet.
No numeric PV installed capacity is approved.
No CBS period, field, unit, or DC/AC convention is approved.
No II3050 scenario column or growth factor value is approved.
No per-node PV allocation is approved.
PV-PARAM-001 remains proposed and the simple PR=0.86/direct-GHI route is not approved by this packet.
No net-load, event detection, P(E), threshold analysis, capacity screen, or manuscript result is run.

governing_decisions.scenario_consistency: A-016 requires scenario-source consistency before executable integrated analysis

ii3050_growth_factor_source.candidate_table: II3050 edition 2 appendices, Table A.1, row 'Zon PV* GW' for 2035 scenario columns
ii3050_growth_factor_source.license: public web publication/citation route; no raw redistributed file in this packet
pi_choices_required: select II3050 scenario column or scenario family for the 2035 planning layer
select denominator for scaling: II3050 reference year, CBS anchor year, or a documented crosswalk
decide whether the growth factor applies uniformly to Alkmaar or needs a local/regional modifier

optional_geometry_allocation_workflow.recommended_next_packet: 3DBAG/PVGIS-pvlib geometry workflow packet after D-014 source retrieval is approved

sources.boundary: does not provide installed PV capacity totals or approve PV-PARAM conversion
sources.license: CC BY 4.0 per 3DBAG documentation; credit required
sources.role: derive Alkmaar roof-plane tilt/aspect/orientation area distribution for later conversion or allocation

sources.boundary: not primary executable source in this packet
sources.role: optional spatial allocation/source discovery if downloadable Alkmaar data, license, and provenance are registered

primary_cbs_anchor_source.alkmaar_row_filter_template: RegioS eq 'GM0361' and Perioden eq '<PERIOD_KEY>' and SectorEnVermogensklasse eq '<SECTOR_AND_SIZE_KEY>'

field_candidates_for_schema_inspection.description: CBS installed panel capacity / paneelvermogen field; recommended default if PI wants DC peak capacity
CBS installed inverter capacity / omvormervermogen field; candidate if PI wants AC or grid-facing convention
installation-count field for diagnostics and allocation plausibility only, not a capacity substitute

geography_candidates.label: Alkmaar municipality
geography_candidates.recommendation: primary local anchor for consistency with EV-007A, D-004, and HP local-scaling proxy

primary_cbs_anchor_source.license: CC-BY 4.0 per data.overheid dataset page; verify again at retrieval time

period_candidates_for_pi_review.recommendation: preferred anchor because CBS notes 2019-2023 definitive in the current table description
sensitivity only if PI accepts provisional/nader voorlopige values

sector_size_candidates_for_pi_review: all sectors and all PV size classes as primary municipal anchor
residential/woningen only as sensitivity if the PV layer is restricted to residential load nodes
small <=15 kWp versus large >15 kWp split as allocation diagnostic, not automatic node allocation
primary_cbs_anchor_source.title: Zonnestroom; vermogen en vermogensklasse, bedrijven en woningen, regio

retrieval_plan_after_pi_approval.checkpoint_resume_behavior: write one checkpoint record after each source: planned URL, output path, size, sha256, retrieval UTC, and source schema hash; resume skips files whose size and sha256 match the checkpoint
retrieval_plan_after_pi_approval.estimated_wall_time: under 15 minutes for CBS OData JSON and one II3050 PDF/page checksum under normal network conditions
retrieval_plan_after_pi_approval.long_run_notice_if_scope_expands:
LONG-RUN NOTICE
Task: E2.S4 D-014 PV capacity source retrieval
Process: retrieve CBS 85005NED Alkmaar records, II3050 appendices, and optional geometry source metadata
Estimated wall time: <estimate from pilot; send before launch if above 15 minutes>
Resource impact: network plus small local JSON/PDF writes; no raw files committed
Checkpoint plan: data/metadata/weather_pv/d014_pv_capacity_retrieval_checkpoint.json after each source
Resume procedure: rerun data/get_pv_capacity.py --retrieve-approved-d014-sources --resume; verified checksums are skipped
